candidate_mapping_themes_top.label: commander-4 maps strongly because it is an enterprise ai workflow platform with rag, semantic caching, evaluation, guardrails, and 2000 users, which is close to the job's architecture and governance needs.
lantern maps to the need for production ai platform design and routing / orchestration patterns, especially if framed as an ai gateway with multi-provider control and reliability features.
technical lead experience at seven.one maps to stakeholder communication and solution design, which this role explicitly values.
commander-4 is the best mapping for productized ai platform work because it demonstrates an enterprise ai product used by 2000 users, which can support a story about adoption and iteration.
lantern can support a narrative about platform-level abstraction and reliability for ai products, but it does not by itself prove commercialization or pre-sales.
technical lead work can map to cross-team collaboration and execution, but the cv should not overstate commercial or channel-partner experience.
commander-4 is highly relevant because it already includes enterprise ai workflows, rag, evaluation, guardrails, and platform reliability concerns that mirror the job's production ai expectations.
lantern is a strong match for the platform-routing and reliability aspects of ai infrastructure, especially where model gateway behavior and resilience matter.
